channel.title: Chain Reaction MAX Blog
channel.description: Strategy notes, setup guides, and product updates for Chain Reaction MAX.

item.title: First Burst Isn't the Win
item.description: Early explosions feel dominant, but Chain Reaction MAX rewards board shape control more than flashy first contact.

item.title: Hosting a Clean Match Session
item.description: Multiplayer rounds feel smoother when setup decisions are locked early and the host flow stays consistent.

item.title: Hosting a Clean Match Session
item.description: Multiplayer rounds feel smoother when setup decisions are locked early and the host flow stays consistent.

item.title: Which Board Size Fits Your Table?
item.description: The grid preset changes more than match length. It changes how readable the pressure feels.
